gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.nationality = 'British' AND T3.year = 2008
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drivers JOIN results ON drivers.driverId = results.driverId JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId WHERE drivers.nationality = 'British' AND races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';
question: How many drivers from the UN participated in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
